tasks.title: Digitação caractere por caractere gera dezenas de fills
tasks.description: Compact sequential fill events. Same selector within 500ms window: keep only the final value. Add _compact_fill_events() in RecordingNormalizer.

tasks.title: goto() excessivo no script gerado
tasks.description: Remove redundant page.goto() calls. Only goto at start + when action causes navigation. Use expect_navigation for intentional navigations.

tasks.title: Healer sugere candidatos genéricos (text=Selecione)
tasks.description: Add _is_generic_text() penalizing: Selecione, OK, Cancelar, Página inicial, Calcular. Score 0.10 for generic text.

tasks.title: Assertions frágeis por CSS estrutural
tasks.description: Prefer get_by_text(), get_by_role(), body.to_contain_text() over long CSS chains.

tasks.title: Métricas de healing inconsistentes
tasks.description: Per-step metrics: falhas_detectadas, healings_tentados, aplicados, validados, rejeitados.

tasks.title: Elementos com bounding box zero aceitos
tasks.description: Validate actionability: visible, enabled, area > 0. Reject bb width=height=0.

tasks.title: URL com & quebra no PowerShell
tasks.description: URL validation: if URL contains & without quotes, warn user. Detect truncated URL.

tasks.title: Logs truncados (candidates: [:h...)
tasks.description: Terminal shows summary. Save full report to file.

tasks.title: Steps pulados não explicados
tasks.description: Log skip reason: 'Step N: skipped — duplicate' or 'non-actionable target'.

tasks.title: Sem artefato semântico auditável
tasks.description: Generate semantic_steps.jsonl alongside script during compile.

tasks.title: Runner continua após falhas críticas
tasks.description: Step dependency: blocking=true + depends_on=step_N. UF fail → block Edifício/Data.
